issue_title: [BUG]: Search node zoom doesn't work intended
issue_body_preview:
### Issue description

For large nodes with huge content and lines, canvas doesn't zoom to it correctly

### Media & Screenshots

_No response_

### Operating system

- OS: [e.g. iOS]: MacOS
- Browser [e.g. chrome, safari]: Brave

### Priority this issue should have

Medium (should be fixed soon)
test_description_zh: 在包含大量内容和多行文本的大型 JSON 数据中，使用搜索功能搜索某个节点，观察画布是否能正确缩放并定位到该节点。
expected_result_zh: 搜索到目标节点后，画布应正确缩放并将视图居中定位到该节点，使节点完整可见，即使节点内容较多、尺寸较大也能正确聚焦显示。
